message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series.pct_change fill_method/limit parity (frankenpandas-gwga)

Adds Series::pct_change_with_fill matching the pandas 2.2 signature
pct_change(periods, fill_method, limit). Supports 'ffill'/'pad' and
'bfill'/'backfill' aliases, threads the limit argument through to the
existing ffill/bfill implementations, and rejects unknown methods with
a pandas-equivalent error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
